name: Indoor Golf of Utah
address: 467 S Main St suite 101, Brigham City, UT 84302
about: Indoor Golf of Utah offers a year-round golf experience using state-of-the-art TrackMan simulation technology. The facility is designed to be accessible regardless of weather or season, featuring multiple simulation bays, professional coaching, and 24/7 member access. It provides a premium indoor environment where golf enthusiasts can play on over 100 world-class courses, receive expert instruction, and participate in leagues and events.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 100 world-class golf courses year-round
24/7 facility access with staff support during business hours
PGA-certified coaching using TrackMan's advanced swing analysis

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food services on the website
No mention of alcohol services on the website

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art dual-radar technology providing precise ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rent equipment at the facility, though specific rental details aren't provided on the website.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website doesn't mention any food or drink services, so it's unclear if outside food and drinks are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the time required to play 18 holes, but individual sessions are available in 1-hour increments.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specifically address kid-friendliness, though it mentions family-oriented leagues and events.
